content.full_text:
January 18, 2005

Larry A. Alamao
Department of Real Estate
Post Office Box 187000
Sacramento, CA 95818-7000

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-243

Dear Mr. Alamao:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice. As we discussed on November 12, 2004, we are in need of additional facts in order to process your request. You stated that you would attempt to obtain the information, however, to date, we have heard nothing further from you regarding your request for advice.

If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Trish Mayer
Political Reform Consultant
